kind: generalize pass98 F32 radix to F32/F16/BF16/U32/U64/I32 (O(n log n) -> O(n))
lever_summary: Replace sort_along_axis_f32_radix with sort_along_axis_literal_radix: per-dtype-family ascending u64 key — Float(F32/F16/BF16)=f64_total_order_key(as_f64), Unsigned(U32/U64)=as_u64, Signed(I32)=(as_i64 as u64)^(1<<63) — reproducing the generic compare_sort_keys order, in O(n) LSD radix. F64/I64 excluded (dense paths).
method: same-bench A/B; baseline = stashed generic comparison sort; normalized by eval/sort_calib_reduce_64k_i64 (ReduceSum, unaffected). u32 A/B on a noisy worker (wide CIs, non-overlapping); f32 (pass98, same machinery) was a clean 2.98x.

change.lever: sort_along_axis_f32_radix -> sort_along_axis_literal_radix (dtype-family key switch); routing calls it unconditionally (self-gates on dtype). Added eval/sort_64k_u32 bench + radix_sort_u32_ascending_matches_unsigned_reference test.

isomorphism.type: BIT-IDENTICAL output permutation per dtype family (Float total_cmp / Unsigned cmp / Signed cmp; both stable); sort emits reordered original literals, argsort same i64 indices
isomorphism.validation: radix_sort_f32_* + radix_sort_u32_* parity tests + 15 sort tests pass

validation.name: sort_tests
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --release sort

validation.name: clippy
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --release --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

note: Completes the radix-sort dtype coverage (F64/I64 dense + F32/F16/BF16/U32/U64/I32 Literal radix). Complex stays generic (lexicographic 2-key, not single-key radix-able).
